# Vynil

> Vynil is a package manager for Kubernetes — the dpkg/rpm equivalent for the cluster,
> designed to produce an integrated Kubernetes distribution rather than provide maximum
> deployment flexibility. You declare package sources (JukeBox) and installations
> (SystemInstance, ServiceInstance, TenantInstance) as Kubernetes resources; an operator
> reconciles them by launching an agent in Jobs that deploy, update, back up, and
> uninstall applications.

Notes:
- Packages are OCI images (metadata in OCI annotations, content = Handlebars templates +
  Rhai scripts).
- Three package types: system (cluster component), service (shared app + CRDs +
  backup), tenant (per-namespace app + backup).
- Security model: the agent runs as cluster-admin and executes package code —
  only install packages from trusted sources. See docs/operations/security.md.
- Documentation in English. All pages are raw Markdown, directly consumable.
- French mirror available under docs/fr/ (same structure, same filenames).

## Documentation

- [Home](docs/index.md): Overview, philosophy, positioning vs Helm/OLM, three-object model.
- [Concepts](docs/concepts.md): Vocabulary — package, type, JukeBox, instance, children/phases, agent vs operator.
- [Building a distribution](docs/distribution.md): Opinionated packaging, bootstrap (cluster pre-config) vs tenant package (user pre-config), CI, operator-or-package guide, upstream box.
- [Installation](docs/installation.md): Deploying the operator, adding a source, installing/uninstalling a package.
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Rust workspace (common/operator/agent), CRDs, flows, InstanceKind trait, metrics.
- [Reconciliation & lifecycle](docs/reconciliation.md): JukeBox scan, do_reconcile, install phases, do_cleanup, error handling.
- [CRD reference](docs/crds.md): JukeBox, SystemInstance, ServiceInstance, TenantInstance, conditions, control annotations.
- [Package format](docs/packages/format.md): Source directory, package.yaml, requirements, options, OCI annotations.
- [Package lifecycle](docs/packages/lifecycle.md): Rhai orchestration, befores/vitals/tofu/others/scalables/posts phases, hooks, backup/restore.
- [OCI package](docs/packages/portability.md): Immutability, auditability, outsourceable development, air-gap, disaster recovery.
- [Package generation](docs/gen-package.md): gen_system/gen_tenant/gen_service from Helm/manifests, update.rhai, HBS helpers.
- [Build & signing](docs/build-signing.md): OCI push + optional Cosign signature at build.
- [JukeBox sources](docs/jukebox/sources.md): list, harbor, gitlab, script, http, s3; maturity and waypoints.
- [GitLab Container Registry](docs/jukebox/gitlab-registry.md): GitLab integration (API url vs OCI registry), token strategies.
- [Registry maintenance](docs/jukebox/registry-maintenance.md): Package image purge — retention rules (maturity, waypoints, package type), scan/purge consistency.
- [Agent CLI reference](docs/cli.md): package/box/system/service/tenant/template/run/crdgen subcommands, flags, exit codes.
- [Package linting](docs/tooling/lint.md): agent package lint, structure/hbs/rhai checks, .vynil-lint.yaml.
- [Package tests](docs/tooling/test.md): agent package test with mocks, internal Rhai regression tests.
- [Security & threat model](docs/operations/security.md): cluster-admin, arbitrary package code, unverified signatures, recommendations.
- [Troubleshooting](docs/operations/troubleshooting.md): instance in error, blocked uninstallation (tenant→service), scan, force-reinstall, suspend.
- [Reference](docs/operations/reference.md): environment variables, metrics, Handlebars templates and helpers, YAML strategy, repository structure.

## Source

- [InstanceKind trait / reconciliation](operator/src/instance_common.rs): Generic do_reconcile/do_cleanup logic shared by all three instance types.
- [JukeBox controller](operator/src/jukebox.rs): Scan, CronJob, Job completion detection.
- [Package type & schema](common/src/vynilpackage.rs): VynilPackage, VynilPackageType, requirements, waypoints.
- [Rhai engine](common/src/rhaihandler.rs): Registration of functions exposed to scripts.
- [OCI handler](common/src/ocihandler.rs): push/pull/sign/verify of package images.
- [Runtime RBAC](box/vynil/systems/rbac.yaml.hbs): Agent cluster-admin bindings (see threat model).
- [Bootstrap](deploy/bootstrap/bootstrap.yaml): Bootstrap (JukeBox vynil + SystemInstance vynil + install Job).
